dismissalComment.html: slapped to cover and Nitish Rana hangs on to a hard chance! Axar's good record against Rohit Sharma continues. This is on a length and spinning away. dismissalText.commentary: Tilak Varma c & b Mukesh Kumar 0 (2b 0x4 0x6 2m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Chipped back to the bowler, Mukesh grabs it even as he slips. And he has two in the over! Mukesh tells Ngidi he can bowl a neat slower ball as well. 114kph, full around off. Tilak was early into the shot as the ball stops on him. Pings the bat and bounces back towards Mukesh, who grabs it despite a bit of a wobble.

dismissalText.commentary: Suryakumar Yadav lbw b Ngidi 51 (36b 3x4 2x6 58m) SR: 141.66

dismissalComment.html: Umpire takes his time and gives it out. Given out lbw, SKY reviews. He was square-on. Back foot in the crease, front just on it. So, height may not be an issue even though he's hit on the right thigh. Was a back-of-length ball that landed just outside off, SKY went for the pull. Got beaten by the pace and lack of bounce. Impact - off stump, once that came up, SKY walked as he knew it'd be hitting the wickets. 122ks but it didn't look like a slower one on first view.

He was running to the right from deep square leg, took a high catch, held on as he decelerated and hugged Kuldeep running in from the other side. dismissalComment.html: Is there anything Bumrah can't do? He nails a direct hit now and Rana has to go! Rana taps this full ball in front on the leg side and is a bit slow to start off on the run. He doesn't really go full speed and is caught short at the non-striker's end as Bumrah is quick to collect, turn and hit the target

liveBlogStory.summary: Delhi Capitals vs Mumbai Indians live cricket score and updates: Both DC and MI look to make it two wins in two in IPL 2026 Match 8 at Arun Jaitley Stadium in the first afternoon game of the season. Toss at 3pm IST, match at 3.30pm IST
